📽️ Cinematic Guidelines

To maintain a premium experience, follow these export settings for all media uploads. The server will automatically optimize images for web performance.

Hero Backdrop

1920x1080 • H.264 MP4

Target: < 10MB

Luxury Photos

2000px Max • JPG/WebP

Target: < 500KB

Video Format

4K Supported • MP4/MOV

Web-optimized preferred
